examples: It was a rich compound of whiskey after-shave lotion shoe polish woolens and the rankness of a mature male.
Good things lost amid a wilderness of weeds, to be sure, whose rankness far overtopped their neglected growth;
You'd think New Yorkers would be quick to defend the capital of the world - but the nose knows; city residents ranked our rankness as the second-worst in the nation, behind, obviously, Baltimore.
